title: PET RESOURCES - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY PET RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers pet resources including trap/neuter/return (TNR) for community cats, pet food, humane education on responsible ownership and pet awareness, and lost and found pet assistance. Delivery of pet food once a month to eligible pet owners. 429 NW Scenic Drive Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Most services: Unrestricted Pet food: Low-income pet owners Delivery: Homebound seniors, veterans, and individuals with disabilities Hours: Monday-Saturday noon-4pm Email (541) 479-5154 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-5154 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None at intake AREA SERVED: Josephine County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Travel North on 7th Street, continue underneath the overpass, and turn right at Scoville Road. Turn left at Scenic Drive. Continue and turn left at the sign for Rogue Valley Humane Society. Services: Feral Cat Management Programs Pet Care Information Pet Food Pet Food * Homebound Subject Specific Public Awareness/Education * Pets Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMAL ADOPTION DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY AND NEUTER VOUCHER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY
